title.kk: Зейнетақы және салықтық жеңілдігі бар шоттар

description.en: Why tax-advantaged accounts exist, how employer matching and steady contributions compound, and how Kazakhstan's pension system works.
description.ru: Зачем существуют налогово-льготные счета, как софинансирование работодателя и регулярные взносы накапливаются со временем, и как работает пенсионная система Казахстана.
description.kk: Салықтық жеңілдігі бар шоттар не үшін қажет, жұмыс берушінің қосымша жарнасы мен тұрақты аударымдар қалай өседі және Қазақстанның зейнетақы жүйесі қалай жұмыс істейді.

description.en: Retirement accounts solve a timing problem: income arrives during working years, but spending continues after work slows or stops.
description.ru: Пенсионные счета решают проблему времени: доход поступает в рабочие годы, а расходы продолжаются, когда работа замедляется или прекращается.
description.kk: Зейнетақы шоттары уақыт мәселесін шешеді: табыс еңбек жылдарында келеді, ал шығын жұмыс азайғанда немесе тоқтағанда да жалғасады.

body.en: Retirement planning is not only about old age. It is about moving part of today's income into years when work income may be lower or gone. A retirement account creates a structure for that transfer across time.
body.ru: Планирование пенсии — это не только про старость. Это перенос части сегодняшнего дохода на годы, когда трудовой доход может быть ниже или исчезнуть. Пенсионный счет создает структуру для такого переноса во времени.
body.kk: Зейнетақыны жоспарлау тек қарттық туралы емес. Бұл бүгінгі табыстың бір бөлігін еңбек табысы азаюы немесе тоқтауы мүмкін жылдарға ауыстыру. Зейнетақы шоты осы уақыт аралық аударымға құрылым береді.

tip.en: The core question is: who pays future you when current work income stops?
tip.ru: Главный вопрос: кто будет платить будущему вам, когда текущий трудовой доход прекратится?
tip.kk: Негізгі сұрақ: қазіргі еңбек табысы тоқтағанда, болашақтағы сізге кім төлейді?

body.en: Long-term money is easy to spend when it sits in the same place as short-term money. Retirement accounts add rules, defaults, tax treatment, or employer systems that separate future income from everyday spending. The structure protects the goal from daily decisions.
body.ru: Долгосрочные деньги легко потратить, если они лежат там же, где деньги на ближайшие расходы. Пенсионные счета добавляют правила, настройки по умолчанию, налоговый режим или систему работодателя, которые отделяют будущий доход от повседневных трат. Такая структура защищает цель от ежедневных решений.
body.kk: Ұзақ мерзімді ақша қысқа мерзімді ақшамен бір жерде тұрса, оны жұмсау оңай. Зейнетақы шоттары болашақ табысты күнделікті шығыннан бөлетін ережелерді, әдепкі баптауларды, салық режимін немесе жұмыс беруші жүйесін қосады. Құрылым мақсатты күнделікті шешімдерден қорғайды.

title.en: Time does much of the work

body.en: Small contributions matter because they can compound for decades. Starting earlier reduces the pressure to save huge amounts later. Waiting turns the same retirement goal into a much steeper monthly obligation.
body.ru: Небольшие взносы важны, потому что они могут накапливаться десятилетиями. Более ранний старт снижает необходимость откладывать огромные суммы позже. Ожидание превращает ту же пенсионную цель в гораздо более тяжелую ежемесячную обязанность.
body.kk: Шағын жарналар маңызды, өйткені олар ондаған жыл бойы күрделі өсіммен ұлғаюы мүмкін. Ертерек бастау кейін үлкен сомалар жинау қысымын азайтады. Күту сол зейнетақы мақсатын әлдеқайда ауыр ай сайынғы міндетке айналдырады.

example.en: Saving ₸25,000 monthly for 30 years creates far more opportunity for compounding than saving ₸50,000 monthly for only 10 years.
example.ru: Откладывать ₸25,000 в месяц в течение 30 лет дает намного больше возможностей для сложного роста, чем откладывать ₸50,000 в месяц всего 10 лет.
example.kk: 30 жыл бойы айына ₸25,000 жинау, тек 10 жыл айына ₸50,000 жинауға қарағанда күрделі өсімге әлдеқайда көп мүмкіндік береді.

title.ru: Одинаковый доход, разное распределение во времени
title.kk: Бірдей табыс, уақыт бойынша әртүрлі бөлу

blocks.text: Two people earn ₸400,000 per month. Both spend money now, but only one deliberately redirects part of income toward later years.

rows: Future income depends mostly on later choices

blocks.text: The account is not magic. It creates a repeated rule that moves money from working years to future spending years.
Два человека зарабатывают ₸400,000 в месяц. Оба тратят деньги сейчас, но только один осознанно направляет часть дохода на будущие годы.

rows: Будущий доход в основном зависит от последующих решений
B за 20 лет до учета доходности

blocks.text: Счет — не магия. Он создает повторяющееся правило, которое переносит деньги из рабочих лет в годы будущих расходов.
Екі адам айына ₸400,000 табады. Екеуі де қазір ақша жұмсайды, бірақ тек біреуі табыстың бір бөлігін кейінгі жылдарға саналы түрде бағыттайды.

rows: Болашақ табыс көбіне кейінгі таңдауларға тәуелді
Болашақ табысқа арналған жеке база қалыптастырады

blocks.text: Шот сиқыр емес. Ол ақшаны еңбек жылдарынан болашақ шығын жылдарына ауыстыратын қайталанатын ереже жасайды.

body.en: Classify each money choice by whether it mainly serves present spending, near-term safety, or future income.
body.ru: Классифицируйте каждое денежное решение по тому, чему оно служит: текущим расходам, краткосрочной безопасности или будущему доходу.
body.kk: Әр ақша таңдауын оның қазіргі шығынға, жақын мерзімді қауіпсіздікке немесе болашақ табысқа қызмет етуі бойынша жіктеңіз.

en.instruction: Drag each choice to the time purpose it best serves.

items.text: A holiday paid from current income

en.explanation: Retirement accounts exist to protect future-income money from being mixed with present spending or short-term safety money.

ru.instruction: Перетащите каждый вариант к той временной цели, которой он лучше всего служит.

items.text: Денежный резерв на случай потери работы

ru.explanation: Пенсионные счета существуют, чтобы деньги будущего дохода не смешивались с текущими расходами или краткосрочным резервом.

kk.instruction: Әр таңдауды оған ең сәйкес уақыт мақсатына апарыңыз.
kk.explanation: Зейнетақы шоттары болашақ табыс ақшасын қазіргі шығын немесе қысқа мерзімді резервпен араластырмау үшін қажет.

body.en: Retirement accounts solve a human and financial problem: future spending needs are real, but today's spending feels closer. The account adds structure, rules, and often tax or employer benefits. Its purpose is to turn long-term saving into a repeatable system.
body.ru: Пенсионные счета решают человеческую и финансовую проблему: будущие расходы реальны, но сегодняшние траты кажутся ближе. Счет добавляет структуру, правила и часто налоговые или работодательские преимущества. Его цель — превратить долгосрочные накопления в повторяемую систему.
body.kk: Зейнетақы шоттары адамдық және қаржылық мәселені шешеді: болашақ шығындар нақты, бірақ бүгінгі шығындар жақынырақ сезіледі. Шот құрылым, ереже және көбіне салықтық немесе жұмыс беруші артықшылықтарын қосады. Мақсаты — ұзақ мерзімді жинақты қайталанатын жүйеге айналдыру.

tip.en: A retirement account is a bridge from working income to future income.
tip.ru: Пенсионный счет — это мост от трудового дохода к будущему доходу.
tip.kk: Зейнетақы шоты — еңбек табысынан болашақ табысқа көпір.

question_text.en: A person says retirement saving can wait because their income will probably rise later. What is the main issue?
question_text.ru: Человек говорит, что пенсионные накопления могут подождать, потому что доход, вероятно, вырастет позже. В чем главная проблема?
question_text.kk: A person says retirement saving can wait because their income will probably rise later. What is the main issue?

answer_text.en: Waiting reduces compounding time and makes the future monthly saving burden larger
answer_text.ru: Ожидание сокращает время сложного роста и увеличивает будущую ежемесячную нагрузку по накоплениям
answer_text.kk: Waiting reduces compounding time and makes the future monthly saving burden larger

answer_text.en: Higher future income always guarantees retirement security
answer_text.ru: Более высокий будущий доход всегда гарантирует пенсионную безопасность
answer_text.kk: Higher future income always guarantees retirement security

answer_text.en: Retirement accounts only work for people near retirement
answer_text.ru: Пенсионные счета работают только для людей рядом с пенсией
answer_text.kk: Retirement accounts only work for people near retirement

answer_text.en: Compounding matters only for one-year goals
answer_text.ru: Сложный рост важен только для целей на один год
answer_text.kk: Compounding matters only for one-year goals

question_text.en: Why is it useful to separate retirement money from everyday spending money?
question_text.ru: Почему полезно отделять пенсионные деньги от денег на ежедневные расходы?
question_text.kk: Why is it useful to separate retirement money from everyday spending money?

answer_text.en: It protects long-term income money from short-term consumption decisions
answer_text.ru: Это защищает деньги долгосрочного дохода от краткосрочных потребительских решений
answer_text.kk: It protects long-term income money from short-term consumption decisions

answer_text.en: It makes the money impossible to invest
answer_text.ru: Это делает деньги невозможными для инвестирования
answer_text.kk: It makes the money impossible to invest

answer_text.en: It removes all market risk
answer_text.ru: Это устраняет весь рыночный риск
answer_text.kk: It removes all market risk

answer_text.en: It means no future contributions are needed
answer_text.ru: Это значит, что будущие взносы не нужны
answer_text.kk: It means no future contributions are needed

question_text.en: What is the best mental model for a retirement account?
question_text.ru: Какая лучшая ментальная модель для пенсионного счета?
question_text.kk: What is the best mental model for a retirement account?

answer_text.en: A system for moving current income into future spending years
answer_text.ru: Система переноса текущего дохода в годы будущих расходов
answer_text.kk: A system for moving current income into future spending years

answer_text.en: A short-term shopping account
answer_text.ru: Краткосрочный счет для покупок
answer_text.kk: A short-term shopping account

answer_text.en: A guaranteed way to become rich quickly
answer_text.ru: Гарантированный способ быстро разбогатеть
answer_text.kk: A guaranteed way to become rich quickly

answer_text.en: A replacement for an emergency fund
answer_text.ru: Замена резервного фонда
answer_text.kk: A replacement for an emergency fund

description.en: Tax-deferred accounts delay taxation, allowing more money to compound now but creating taxable income later.
description.ru: Счета с отложенным налогообложением переносят налог на будущее, позволяя большей сумме расти сейчас, но создавая налогооблагаемый доход позже.
description.kk: Tax-deferred accounts delay taxation, allowing more money to compound now but creating taxable income later.

title.ru: Срок уплаты налога меняет сложный рост

body.en: A tax-deferred account does not make taxes disappear. It changes when tax is paid. By delaying tax, more money may stay invested today, which can increase the amount that compounds over time.
body.ru: Счет с отложенным налогообложением не отменяет налоги. Он меняет момент их уплаты. Если налог откладывается, больше денег может оставаться инвестированным сегодня, что увеличивает сумму, которая растет со временем.
body.kk: A tax-deferred account does not make taxes disappear. It changes when tax is paid. By delaying tax, more money may stay invested today, which can increase the amount that compounds over time.

tip.ru: Отложенный означает позже, а не никогда.

body.en: With tax deferral, contributions or growth may avoid current tax, depending on the system. Later withdrawals may be taxed as income. This can help when your tax rate now is higher than your expected rate in retirement.
body.ru: При отложенном налоге взносы или рост могут не облагаться текущим налогом, в зависимости от системы. Поздние снятия могут облагаться как доход. Это помогает, если ваша налоговая ставка сейчас выше ожидаемой ставки на пенсии.
body.kk: With tax deferral, contributions or growth may avoid current tax, depending on the system. Later withdrawals may be taxed as income. This can help when your tax rate now is higher than your expected rate in retirement.

title.en: Why the account balance can look bigger
title.ru: Почему баланс счета может выглядеть больше
title.kk: Why the account balance can look bigger

body.en: Because tax is delayed, the visible balance may include money that will partly belong to the tax authority later. Comparing a tax-deferred balance with a fully after-tax balance can be misleading. The after-tax value is what funds spending.
body.ru: Поскольку налог отложен, видимый баланс может включать деньги, часть которых позже будет принадлежать налоговому органу. Сравнивать отложенный баланс с полностью посленалоговым балансом может быть ошибочно. Расходы финансирует именно сумма после налогов.
body.kk: Because tax is delayed, the visible balance may include money that will partly belong to the tax authority later. Comparing a tax-deferred balance with a fully after-tax balance can be misleading. The after-tax value is what funds spending.

example.en: A ₸10,000,000 deferred balance is not the same as ₸10,000,000 spendable cash if future withdrawals are taxable.
example.ru: Отложенный баланс ₸10,000,000 — это не то же самое, что ₸10,000,000 доступных денег, если будущие снятия облагаются налогом.
example.kk: A ₸10,000,000 deferred balance is not the same as ₸10,000,000 spendable cash if future withdrawals are taxable.

blocks.text: Suppose ₸1,000,000 can be invested. In one case tax is paid first; in the other, tax is delayed until withdrawal.
The benefit is strongest when deferral increases compounding and future tax rates are not higher enough to erase it.
Допустим, можно инвестировать ₸1,000,000. В одном случае налог платится сначала; в другом — откладывается до снятия.
Польза сильнее всего, когда отсрочка усиливает сложный рост, а будущие налоговые ставки не настолько выше, чтобы стереть этот эффект.
Suppose ₸1,000,000 can be invested. In one case tax is paid first; in the other, tax is delayed until withdrawal.
The benefit is strongest when deferral increases compounding and future tax rates are not higher enough to erase it.

body.en: Choose the correct interpretation of each tax-deferred situation.
body.ru: Выберите правильное толкование каждой ситуации с отложенным налогом.
body.kk: Choose the correct interpretation of each tax-deferred situation.

en.instruction: Select the best label for each statement.

scenarios.text: An account lets more money stay invested now, but withdrawals may be taxable later.
scenarios.explanation: The account changes tax timing, not the basic need to fund taxes.

scenarios.text: A person compares spendable retirement money after future withdrawal taxes.
scenarios.explanation: Retirement spending depends on what remains after tax.

scenarios.text: A deferred account means taxes can be ignored forever.
scenarios.explanation: Deferred taxation is delayed taxation, not necessarily zero taxation.

ru.instruction: Выберите лучший ярлык для каждого утверждения.

scenarios.text: Счет позволяет большей сумме оставаться инвестированной сейчас, но снятия позже могут облагаться налогом.
scenarios.explanation: Счет меняет срок уплаты налога, а не саму необходимость платить налоги.

scenarios.text: Человек сравнивает доступные пенсионные деньги после будущих налогов на снятие.
scenarios.explanation: Пенсионные расходы зависят от того, что остается после налогов.

scenarios.text: Отложенный счет означает, что налоги можно игнорировать навсегда.
scenarios.explanation: Отложенное налогообложение — это перенесенный налог, а не обязательно нулевой налог.

kk.instruction: Select the best label for each statement.

scenarios.text: An account lets more money stay invested now, but withdrawals may be taxable later.
scenarios.explanation: The account changes tax timing, not the basic need to fund taxes.

scenarios.text: A person compares spendable retirement money after future withdrawal taxes.
scenarios.explanation: Retirement spending depends on what remains after tax.

scenarios.text: A deferred account means taxes can be ignored forever.
scenarios.explanation: Deferred taxation is delayed taxation, not necessarily zero taxation.

title.ru: Думайте о пенсионном доходе после налогов

body.en: Tax-deferred accounts can be powerful because they let more money work now. But the account balance is not always fully spendable. Good planning asks what the contribution saves today, how the money compounds, and what tax may apply later.
body.ru: Счета с отложенным налогом могут быть сильными, потому что позволяют большей сумме работать сейчас. Но баланс не всегда полностью доступен для трат. Хорошее планирование спрашивает, что взнос экономит сегодня, как деньги растут и какой налог может быть позже.
body.kk: Tax-deferred accounts can be powerful because they let more money work now. But the account balance is not always fully spendable. Good planning asks what the contribution saves today, how the money compounds, and what tax may apply later.

tip.en: The useful comparison is after-tax income across time, not headline account size.
tip.ru: Полезное сравнение — это доход после налогов во времени, а не крупный баланс на экране.
tip.kk: The useful comparison is after-tax income across time, not headline account size.

question_text.en: A person says a tax-deferred account means they will never pay tax on that money. What is the correction?
question_text.ru: A person says a tax-deferred account means they will never pay tax on that money. What is the correction?
question_text.kk: A person says a tax-deferred account means they will never pay tax on that money. What is the correction?

answer_text.en: Tax may be delayed until withdrawal rather than eliminated
answer_text.ru: Tax may be delayed until withdrawal rather than eliminated
answer_text.kk: Tax may be delayed until withdrawal rather than eliminated

answer_text.en: Tax-deferred money cannot be invested
answer_text.ru: Tax-deferred money cannot be invested
answer_text.kk: Tax-deferred money cannot be invested

answer_text.en: Tax-deferred accounts always lose money
answer_text.ru: Tax-deferred accounts always lose money
answer_text.kk: Tax-deferred accounts always lose money

answer_text.en: Tax is paid twice immediately
answer_text.ru: Tax is paid twice immediately
answer_text.kk: Tax is paid twice immediately

question_text.en: Why can tax deferral help compounding?
question_text.ru: Why can tax deferral help compounding?
question_text.kk: Why can tax deferral help compounding?

answer_text.en: More money may remain invested before tax is paid later
answer_text.ru: More money may remain invested before tax is paid later
answer_text.kk: More money may remain invested before tax is paid later

answer_text.en: The investment return becomes guaranteed
answer_text.ru: The investment return becomes guaranteed
answer_text.kk: The investment return becomes guaranteed

answer_text.en: The account removes all fees
answer_text.ru: The account removes all fees
answer_text.kk: The account removes all fees

answer_text.en: The future tax rate is always zero
answer_text.ru: The future tax rate is always zero
answer_text.kk: The future tax rate is always zero

question_text.en: Why can a tax-deferred balance overstate spendable wealth?
question_text.ru: Why can a tax-deferred balance overstate spendable wealth?
question_text.kk: Why can a tax-deferred balance overstate spendable wealth?

answer_text.en: Some of the balance may be owed as tax when withdrawn
answer_text.ru: Some of the balance may be owed as tax when withdrawn
answer_text.kk: Some of the balance may be owed as tax when withdrawn

answer_text.en: The balance is always fake
answer_text.ru: The balance is always fake
answer_text.kk: The balance is always fake

answer_text.en: The account cannot hold real assets
answer_text.ru: The account cannot hold real assets
answer_text.kk: The account cannot hold real assets

answer_text.en: Deferred accounts cannot be used in retirement
answer_text.ru: Deferred accounts cannot be used in retirement
answer_text.kk: Deferred accounts cannot be used in retirement

description.en: Tax-free accounts usually use after-tax contributions but allow qualified growth or withdrawals to avoid later tax.
description.ru: Безналоговые счета обычно используют взносы после налогов, но позволяют квалифицированному росту или снятиям избежать налога позже.
description.kk: Tax-free accounts usually use after-tax contributions but allow qualified growth or withdrawals to avoid later tax.

title.en: Pay now to avoid tax later
title.ru: Заплатить сейчас, чтобы избежать налога позже
title.kk: Pay now to avoid tax later

body.en: A tax-free account usually works in the opposite direction from tax deferral. You contribute money after tax, then qualified growth or withdrawals may avoid tax later. The appeal is certainty over future spendable value.
body.ru: Безналоговый счет обычно работает противоположно отсрочке налога. Вы вносите деньги после налогов, а затем квалифицированный рост или снятия могут не облагаться налогом позже. Его привлекательность — в уверенности относительно будущей доступной суммы.
body.kk: A tax-free account usually works in the opposite direction from tax deferral. You contribute money after tax, then qualified growth or withdrawals may avoid tax later. The appeal is certainty over future spendable value.

title.en: The benefit depends on future growth
title.kk: The benefit depends on future growth

body.en: The longer money grows, the more valuable tax-free treatment can become. Paying tax before investing may feel painful, but if the account later grows for decades, avoiding tax on growth can matter a lot. Time magnifies the difference.
body.ru: Чем дольше растут деньги, тем ценнее может быть безналоговый режим. Платить налог до инвестирования может быть неприятно, но если счет потом растет десятилетиями, освобождение роста от налога может сильно повлиять. Время усиливает разницу.
body.kk: The longer money grows, the more valuable tax-free treatment can become. Paying tax before investing may feel painful, but if the account later grows for decades, avoiding tax on growth can matter a lot. Time magnifies the difference.

tip.en: Tax-free growth is most valuable when growth has enough time to become large.
tip.ru: Безналоговый рост наиболее ценен, когда у роста достаточно времени стать большим.
tip.kk: Tax-free growth is most valuable when growth has enough time to become large.

body.en: Tax-free treatment usually depends on meeting account rules, contribution limits, eligible investments, or withdrawal conditions. Breaking rules can create taxes or penalties. The tax benefit is part of a system, not a blank permission slip.
body.ru: Безналоговый режим обычно зависит от соблюдения правил счета, лимитов взносов, допустимых инвестиций или условий снятия. Нарушение правил может привести к налогам или штрафам. Налоговая льгота — часть системы, а не пустое разрешение.
body.kk: Tax-free treatment usually depends on meeting account rules, contribution limits, eligible investments, or withdrawal conditions. Breaking rules can create taxes or penalties. The tax benefit is part of a system, not a blank permission slip.

blocks.text: A person invests ₸1,000,000 after tax. If it doubles over time, the tax treatment of the growth changes the spendable result.
The account is valuable not because the starting money is larger, but because future growth may be cleaner to spend.
Человек инвестирует ₸1,000,000 после налогов. Если сумма со временем удвоится, налоговый режим роста изменит доступный результат.
Счет ценен не потому, что начальная сумма больше, а потому что будущий рост может быть чище для трат.
A person invests ₸1,000,000 after tax. If it doubles over time, the tax treatment of the growth changes the spendable result.
The account is valuable not because the starting money is larger, but because future growth may be cleaner to spend.

body.en: Label each statement by the tax-free account concept it represents.
body.ru: Пометьте каждое утверждение понятием безналогового счета, которое оно отражает.
body.kk: Label each statement by the tax-free account concept it represents.

en.instruction: Choose the best label for each scenario.

scenarios.text: The investor contributes money that has already been taxed.
scenarios.explanation: Tax-free accounts often start with after-tax money.

scenarios.text: Investment gains can be withdrawn without tax if account rules are met.
scenarios.explanation: The main benefit is often avoiding tax on qualified growth or withdrawals.

scenarios.text: Early or ineligible withdrawals may lose the special treatment.
scenarios.explanation: The benefit depends on following account rules.

ru.instruction: Choose the best label for each scenario.

scenarios.text: Инвестор вносит деньги, с которых налог уже уплачен.
scenarios.explanation: Безналоговые счета часто начинаются с денег после налогов.

scenarios.text: Инвестиционная прибыль может сниматься без налога, если соблюдены правила счета.
scenarios.explanation: Главная польза часто в том, чтобы избежать налога на квалифицированный рост или снятия.

scenarios.text: Ранние или недопустимые снятия могут лишиться особого режима.
scenarios.explanation: Польза зависит от соблюдения правил счета.

kk.instruction: Choose the best label for each scenario.

scenarios.text: The investor contributes money that has already been taxed.
scenarios.explanation: Tax-free accounts often start with after-tax money.

scenarios.text: Investment gains can be withdrawn without tax if account rules are met.
scenarios.explanation: The main benefit is often avoiding tax on qualified growth or withdrawals.

scenarios.text: Early or ineligible withdrawals may lose the special treatment.
scenarios.explanation: The benefit depends on following account rules.

title.ru: Безналоговый режим выгоден при длинном горизонте

body.en: Tax-free accounts can be powerful when after-tax money grows for many years and later withdrawals meet the rules. The decision depends on today's tax cost, expected growth, future tax rates, and rule flexibility. The benefit is future spendable certainty.
body.ru: Безналоговые счета могут быть сильными, когда деньги после налогов растут много лет, а будущие снятия соответствуют правилам. Решение зависит от сегодняшней налоговой цены, ожидаемого роста, будущих ставок и гибкости правил. Польза — в будущей уверенности доступных средств.
body.kk: Tax-free accounts can be powerful when after-tax money grows for many years and later withdrawals meet the rules. The decision depends on today's tax cost, expected growth, future tax rates, and rule flexibility. The benefit is future spendable certainty.

tip.en: Tax-free treatment is most useful when the growth, not just the contribution, becomes large.
tip.ru: Безналоговый режим наиболее полезен, когда большим становится рост, а не только взнос.
tip.kk: Tax-free treatment is most useful when the growth, not just the contribution, becomes large.

question_text.en: Why might a young investor value tax-free growth highly?
question_text.ru: Why might a young investor value tax-free growth highly?
question_text.kk: Why might a young investor value tax-free growth highly?

answer_text.en: Long time horizons can make future growth large, and qualified tax-free treatment protects that growth
answer_text.ru: Long time horizons can make future growth large, and qualified tax-free treatment protects that growth
answer_text.kk: Long time horizons can make future growth large, and qualified tax-free treatment protects that growth

answer_text.en: Young investors never pay tax on income
answer_text.ru: Young investors never pay tax on income
answer_text.kk: Young investors never pay tax on income

answer_text.en: Tax-free accounts guarantee high returns
answer_text.ru: Tax-free accounts guarantee high returns
answer_text.kk: Tax-free accounts guarantee high returns

answer_text.en: Tax-free accounts remove all contribution limits
answer_text.ru: Tax-free accounts remove all contribution limits
answer_text.kk: Tax-free accounts remove all contribution limits

question_text.en: What is a common trade-off of tax-free account design?
question_text.ru: What is a common trade-off of tax-free account design?
question_text.kk: What is a common trade-off of tax-free account design?

answer_text.en: You may contribute after-tax money now to reduce tax on qualified growth or withdrawals later
answer_text.ru: You may contribute after-tax money now to reduce tax on qualified growth or withdrawals later
answer_text.kk: You may contribute after-tax money now to reduce tax on qualified growth or withdrawals later

answer_text.en: You borrow from the account without repayment forever
answer_text.ru: You borrow from the account without repayment forever
answer_text.kk: You borrow from the account without repayment forever

answer_text.en: You avoid all rules and limits
answer_text.ru: You avoid all rules and limits
answer_text.kk: You avoid all rules and limits

answer_text.en: You receive a guaranteed employer match in every case
answer_text.ru: You receive a guaranteed employer match in every case
answer_text.kk: You receive a guaranteed employer match in every case

question_text.en: Why should rules matter when using a tax-free account?
question_text.ru: Why should rules matter when using a tax-free account?
question_text.kk: Why should rules matter when using a tax-free account?

answer_text.en: Breaking withdrawal or eligibility rules can reduce or remove the tax benefit
answer_text.ru: Breaking withdrawal or eligibility rules can reduce or remove the tax benefit
answer_text.kk: Breaking withdrawal or eligibility rules can reduce or remove the tax benefit

answer_text.en: Rules only apply to taxable accounts
answer_text.ru: Rules only apply to taxable accounts
answer_text.kk: Rules only apply to taxable accounts

answer_text.en: Tax-free accounts cannot hold investments
answer_text.ru: Tax-free accounts cannot hold investments
answer_text.kk: Tax-free accounts cannot hold investments

answer_text.en: Rules guarantee the investment will not fall
answer_text.ru: Rules guarantee the investment will not fall
answer_text.kk: Rules guarantee the investment will not fall

description.en: Employer matching turns part of your contribution into extra compensation, but only if you contribute enough and follow the plan rules.
description.ru: Софинансирование работодателя превращает часть вашего взноса в дополнительную компенсацию, но только если вы вносите достаточно и соблюдаете правила плана.
description.kk: Employer matching turns part of your contribution into extra compensation, but only if you contribute enough and follow the plan rules.

title.en: A match is part of pay
title.kk: A match is part of pay

body.en: Employer matching means the employer adds money to your retirement account when you contribute. It is not a market return; it is compensation tied to a saving behavior. Ignoring a match can mean leaving part of pay unused.
body.ru: Софинансирование означает, что работодатель добавляет деньги на ваш пенсионный счет, когда вы делаете взнос. Это не рыночная доходность, а компенсация, связанная с поведением накопления. Игнорировать match — значит оставить часть оплаты неиспользованной.
body.kk: Employer matching means the employer adds money to your retirement account when you contribute. It is not a market return; it is compensation tied to a saving behavior. Ignoring a match can mean leaving part of pay unused.

tip.en: Treat a reliable match as salary that requires an action to unlock.
tip.ru: Относитесь к надежному match как к зарплате, которую нужно разблокировать действием.
tip.kk: Treat a reliable match as salary that requires an action to unlock.

body.en: A match might be 50% of your contribution up to a limit, or 100% up to a smaller limit. The value depends on salary, contribution rate, cap, and vesting rules. You need the formula to know the real benefit.
body.ru: A match might be 50% of your contribution up to a limit, or 100% up to a smaller limit. The value depends on salary, contribution rate, cap, and vesting rules. You need the formula to know the real benefit.
body.kk: A match might be 50% of your contribution up to a limit, or 100% up to a smaller limit. The value depends on salary, contribution rate, cap, and vesting rules. You need the formula to know the real benefit.

body.en: Some plans require you to stay employed for a period before employer contributions fully belong to you. This is called vesting. A match can be valuable, but leaving before vesting may reduce what you keep.
body.ru: Some plans require you to stay employed for a period before employer contributions fully belong to you. This is called vesting. A match can be valuable, but leaving before vesting may reduce what you keep.
body.kk: Some plans require you to stay employed for a period before employer contributions fully belong to you. This is called vesting. A match can be valuable, but leaving before vesting may reduce what you keep.

example.en: If ₸300,000 of employer match vests after two years, leaving after six months may mean keeping less or none of that match, depending on rules.
example.ru: If ₸300,000 of employer match vests after two years, leaving after six months may mean keeping less or none of that match, depending on rules.
example.kk: If ₸300,000 of employer match vests after two years, leaving after six months may mean keeping less or none of that match, depending on rules.

blocks.text: An employee earns ₸500,000 monthly. The employer matches 50% of the employee contribution up to 6% of salary.
The match is strongest up to the cap. Contributions above the cap may still be useful, but they do not unlock more employer money.
An employee earns ₸500,000 monthly. The employer matches 50% of the employee contribution up to 6% of salary.
The match is strongest up to the cap. Contributions above the cap may still be useful, but they do not unlock more employer money.
An employee earns ₸500,000 monthly. The employer matches 50% of the employee contribution up to 6% of salary.
The match is strongest up to the cap. Contributions above the cap may still be useful, but they do not unlock more employer money.

body.en: Use a salary of ₸500,000. Split the monthly income so retirement contribution is at least ₸30,000 to capture the full match in this example.
body.ru: Use a salary of ₸500,000. Split the monthly income so retirement contribution is at least ₸30,000 to capture the full match in this example.
body.kk: Use a salary of ₸500,000. Split the monthly income so retirement contribution is at least ₸30,000 to capture the full match in this example.

en.instruction: Distribute ₸500,000 across spending, retirement contribution, and other saving. The total must equal ₸500,000.
en.explanation: In this match formula, ₸30,000 is the contribution that reaches 6% of salary. Less than that leaves some employer match unused.

ru.instruction: Distribute ₸500,000 across spending, retirement contribution, and other saving. The total must equal ₸500,000.
ru.explanation: In this match formula, ₸30,000 is the contribution that reaches 6% of salary. Less than that leaves some employer match unused.

kk.instruction: Distribute ₸500,000 across spending, retirement contribution, and other saving. The total must equal ₸500,000.
kk.explanation: In this match formula, ₸30,000 is the contribution that reaches 6% of salary. Less than that leaves some employer match unused.

body.en: Employer matching can be one of the highest-value parts of a retirement system because it adds money before investment returns even begin. But the details matter: formula, cap, eligibility, and vesting. A good first target is often contributing enough to capture the full reliable match.
body.ru: Employer matching can be one of the highest-value parts of a retirement system because it adds money before investment returns even begin. But the details matter: formula, cap, eligibility, and vesting. A good first target is often contributing enough to capture the full reliable match.
body.kk: Employer matching can be one of the highest-value parts of a retirement system because it adds money before investment returns even begin. But the details matter: formula, cap, eligibility, and vesting. A good first target is often contributing enough to capture the full reliable match.

tip.en: Match first, then optimize the rest of the plan.
tip.ru: Сначала match, затем оптимизируйте остальной план.
tip.kk: Match first, then optimize the rest of the plan.

answer_text.ru: They automatically receive the full match anyway

answer_text.ru: The match makes investment risk disappear

description.en: A contribution strategy balances match capture, emergency reserves, debt, tax treatment, automation, and gradual increases.
description.ru: Стратегия взносов балансирует получение match, резерв, долги, налоговый режим, автоматизацию и постепенные увеличения.
description.kk: A contribution strategy balances match capture, emergency reserves, debt, tax treatment, automation, and gradual increases.

body.en: Retirement saving competes with rent, debt, emergencies, and short-term goals. A contribution strategy decides what gets funded first and why. The goal is not the maximum contribution immediately, but a sustainable rule that survives real life.
body.ru: Retirement saving competes with rent, debt, emergencies, and short-term goals. A contribution strategy decides what gets funded first and why. The goal is not the maximum contribution immediately, but a sustainable rule that survives real life.
body.kk: Retirement saving competes with rent, debt, emergencies, and short-term goals. A contribution strategy decides what gets funded first and why. The goal is not the maximum contribution immediately, but a sustainable rule that survives real life.

body.en: Many people first build a small emergency buffer, capture any reliable employer match, and avoid high-interest debt traps. After that, they raise contributions gradually. This order protects against needing to withdraw long-term money during a short-term shock.
body.ru: Many people first build a small emergency buffer, capture any reliable employer match, and avoid high-interest debt traps. After that, they raise contributions gradually. This order protects against needing to withdraw long-term money during a short-term shock.
body.kk: Many people first build a small emergency buffer, capture any reliable employer match, and avoid high-interest debt traps. After that, they raise contributions gradually. This order protects against needing to withdraw long-term money during a short-term shock.

tip.en: A retirement plan without a cash buffer can be broken by one emergency.
tip.ru: Пенсионный план без денежного буфера может сломаться из-за одной чрезвычайной ситуации.
tip.kk: A retirement plan without a cash buffer can be broken by one emergency.

body.en: Automatic contributions turn saving into a default instead of a monthly debate. Increasing the contribution after raises can also prevent lifestyle creep. The strategy works because it changes the system, not because you feel motivated every month.
body.ru: Automatic contributions turn saving into a default instead of a monthly debate. Increasing the contribution after raises can also prevent lifestyle creep. The strategy works because it changes the system, not because you feel motivated every month.
body.kk: Automatic contributions turn saving into a default instead of a monthly debate. Increasing the contribution after raises can also prevent lifestyle creep. The strategy works because it changes the system, not because you feel motivated every month.

example.en: If income rises by ₸50,000, increasing retirement contributions by ₸15,000 still leaves ₸35,000 for current life while raising future income.
example.ru: If income rises by ₸50,000, increasing retirement contributions by ₸15,000 still leaves ₸35,000 for current life while raising future income.
example.kk: If income rises by ₸50,000, increasing retirement contributions by ₸15,000 still leaves ₸35,000 for current life while raising future income.

blocks.text: A worker earns ₸450,000 monthly and wants a sustainable plan. The sequence matters because each step solves a different risk.

rows: Avoids using debt for small shocks
Contribute enough for full employer match
Raise contribution by 1–2% after salary increases
Builds retirement saving without sudden pain

blocks.text: The plan is a sequence, not a single heroic contribution.
A worker earns ₸450,000 monthly and wants a sustainable plan. The sequence matters because each step solves a different risk.

rows: Помогает не брать долг при небольших неожиданностях
Вносить достаточно для полного match работодателя
Погасить долг с очень высокой ставкой
Повышать взнос на 1–2% после роста зарплаты
Увеличивает пенсионные накопления без резкой боли

blocks.text: План — это последовательность, а не один героический взнос.

en.instruction: Select the most sensible next step.

scenarios.text: A person has no emergency cash and would use a microloan for a sudden ₸80,000 expense.
scenarios.explanation: A starter buffer protects the retirement plan from short-term shocks.

scenarios.text: An employer match is available, but the person contributes below the match cap.
scenarios.explanation: Reliable match is extra compensation tied to contribution behavior.

scenarios.text: A person pays very high interest on short-term debt while investing small amounts.
scenarios.explanation: High-interest debt can overwhelm investment progress.

scenarios.text: A person gets a raise and already has a buffer and no high-interest debt.
scenarios.explanation: Raising contributions after income growth reduces lifestyle creep.

body.en: The best contribution strategy is one you can keep through normal problems. Capture high-value benefits, protect against emergencies, avoid expensive debt, automate contributions, and raise them when income grows. Durability matters more than an impressive first month.
body.ru: The best contribution strategy is one you can keep through normal problems. Capture high-value benefits, protect against emergencies, avoid expensive debt, automate contributions, and raise them when income grows. Durability matters more than an impressive first month.
body.kk: The best contribution strategy is one you can keep through normal problems. Capture high-value benefits, protect against emergencies, avoid expensive debt, automate contributions, and raise them when income grows. Durability matters more than an impressive first month.

tip.en: A sustainable 8% that continues can beat a painful 20% that stops.
tip.ru: Устойчивые 8%, которые продолжаются, могут победить болезненные 20%, которые прекращаются.
tip.kk: A sustainable 8% that continues can beat a painful 20% that stops.

title.ru: Пенсионная система РК: ЕНПФ + добровольные взносы
title.kk: ҚР зейнетақы жүйесі: БЖЗҚ + ерікті жарналар

description.en: Kazakhstan's pension system centers on mandatory accumulated pension contributions through UAPF, with voluntary options adding flexibility.
description.ru: Пенсионная система Казахстана строится вокруг обязательных накопительных пенсионных взносов через ЕНПФ, а добровольные варианты добавляют гибкость.
description.kk: Kazakhstan's pension system centers on mandatory accumulated pension contributions through UAPF, with voluntary options adding flexibility.

title.en: Kazakhstan uses an accumulated pension model
title.kk: Kazakhstan uses an accumulated pension model

body.en: Kazakhstan's pension system includes mandatory accumulated pension contributions handled through the Unified Accumulative Pension Fund, often called UAPF. The basic idea is that part of working income is directed toward future retirement income. Voluntary contributions can add another layer.
body.ru: Kazakhstan's pension system includes mandatory accumulated pension contributions handled through the Unified Accumulative Pension Fund, often called UAPF. The basic idea is that part of working income is directed toward future retirement income. Voluntary contributions can add another layer.
body.kk: Kazakhstan's pension system includes mandatory accumulated pension contributions handled through the Unified Accumulative Pension Fund, often called UAPF. The basic idea is that part of working income is directed toward future retirement income. Voluntary contributions can add another layer.

tip.en: In Kazakhstan, pension planning is not only personal choice; part of it is built into the income system.
tip.ru: В Казахстане пенсионное планирование — не только личный выбор; часть его встроена в систему доходов.
tip.kk: In Kazakhstan, pension planning is not only personal choice; part of it is built into the income system.

body.en: Mandatory pension contributions create a retirement base by moving a portion of income into a dedicated pension account. This reduces the chance that retirement saving is skipped completely. But a baseline is not always the same as a complete retirement plan.
body.ru: Mandatory pension contributions create a retirement base by moving a portion of income into a dedicated pension account. This reduces the chance that retirement saving is skipped completely. But a baseline is not always the same as a complete retirement plan.
body.kk: Mandatory pension contributions create a retirement base by moving a portion of income into a dedicated pension account. This reduces the chance that retirement saving is skipped completely. But a baseline is not always the same as a complete retirement plan.

body.en: Voluntary pension contributions can help people increase future retirement income beyond the mandatory level. They may be useful for irregular earners, people with higher retirement goals, or those who started saving late. The key is to understand rules, access, risk, and expected need.
body.ru: Voluntary pension contributions can help people increase future retirement income beyond the mandatory level. They may be useful for irregular earners, people with higher retirement goals, or those who started saving late. The key is to understand rules, access, risk, and expected need.
body.kk: Voluntary pension contributions can help people increase future retirement income beyond the mandatory level. They may be useful for irregular earners, people with higher retirement goals, or those who started saving late. The key is to understand rules, access, risk, and expected need.

example.en: Adding ₸20,000 monthly voluntarily creates ₸240,000 per year of extra retirement funding before investment results.
example.ru: Adding ₸20,000 monthly voluntarily creates ₸240,000 per year of extra retirement funding before investment results.
example.kk: Adding ₸20,000 monthly voluntarily creates ₸240,000 per year of extra retirement funding before investment results.

blocks.text: A worker earns ₸500,000 monthly and wants stronger future retirement income. The pension system provides a base, but the worker can still plan around the gap.

rows: Protects long-term accounts from short-term shocks

blocks.text: The pension account is one layer of the plan. A complete plan may also need flexible savings and investments outside the pension system.

title.en: Know the baseline, then plan the gap
title.kk: Know the baseline, then plan the gap

body.en: Kazakhstan's pension system creates an important starting point through accumulated pension contributions. But personal retirement readiness still depends on income, contribution history, goals, inflation, and flexible savings. Use the system as a base, then decide what extra layer your future needs require.
body.ru: Kazakhstan's pension system creates an important starting point through accumulated pension contributions. But personal retirement readiness still depends on income, contribution history, goals, inflation, and flexible savings. Use the system as a base, then decide what extra layer your future needs require.
body.kk: Kazakhstan's pension system creates an important starting point through accumulated pension contributions. But personal retirement readiness still depends on income, contribution history, goals, inflation, and flexible savings. Use the system as a base, then decide what extra layer your future needs require.

tip.en: Mandatory pension saving is a foundation, not automatically the whole building.
tip.ru: Обязательные пенсионные накопления — это фундамент, а не автоматически все здание.
tip.kk: Mandatory pension saving is a foundation, not automatically the whole building.

question_text.en: Why should a worker not treat mandatory pension contributions as the whole retirement plan automatically?
question_text.ru: Why should a worker not treat mandatory pension contributions as the whole retirement plan automatically?
question_text.kk: Why should a worker not treat mandatory pension contributions as the whole retirement plan automatically?

answer_text.en: The mandatory base may not fully match their future spending goals, inflation, or flexibility needs
answer_text.ru: The mandatory base may not fully match their future spending goals, inflation, or flexibility needs
answer_text.kk: The mandatory base may not fully match their future spending goals, inflation, or flexibility needs

answer_text.en: Mandatory contributions are never invested
answer_text.ru: Mandatory contributions are never invested
answer_text.kk: Mandatory contributions are never invested

answer_text.en: A pension system makes personal planning illegal
answer_text.ru: A pension system makes personal planning illegal
answer_text.kk: A pension system makes personal planning illegal

answer_text.en: Future spending needs are always lower than expected
answer_text.ru: Future spending needs are always lower than expected
answer_text.kk: Future spending needs are always lower than expected

question_text.en: What is the role of voluntary pension contributions?
question_text.ru: What is the role of voluntary pension contributions?
question_text.kk: What is the role of voluntary pension contributions?

answer_text.en: They can add extra retirement funding beyond the mandatory layer
answer_text.ru: They can add extra retirement funding beyond the mandatory layer
answer_text.kk: They can add extra retirement funding beyond the mandatory layer

answer_text.en: They replace the need to understand pension rules
answer_text.ru: They replace the need to understand pension rules
answer_text.kk: They replace the need to understand pension rules

answer_text.en: They are the same as daily spending money
answer_text.ru: They are the same as daily spending money
answer_text.kk: They are the same as daily spending money

answer_text.en: They guarantee unlimited retirement income
answer_text.ru: They guarantee unlimited retirement income
answer_text.kk: They guarantee unlimited retirement income

question_text.en: Why keep some flexible savings outside pension accounts?
question_text.ru: Why keep some flexible savings outside pension accounts?
question_text.kk: Why keep some flexible savings outside pension accounts?

answer_text.en: Short-term shocks and flexible goals may need money that is not locked into retirement rules
answer_text.ru: Short-term shocks and flexible goals may need money that is not locked into retirement rules
answer_text.kk: Short-term shocks and flexible goals may need money that is not locked into retirement rules

answer_text.en: Flexible savings always earns more than pensions
answer_text.ru: Flexible savings always earns more than pensions
answer_text.kk: Flexible savings always earns more than pensions

answer_text.en: Emergency money should be invested only in risky assets
answer_text.ru: Emergency money should be invested only in risky assets
answer_text.kk: Emergency money should be invested only in risky assets

answer_text.en: Pension accounts are useless if flexible savings exists
answer_text.ru: Pension accounts are useless if flexible savings exists
answer_text.kk: Pension accounts are useless if flexible savings exists

question_text.en: What problem do retirement accounts mainly solve?
question_text.ru: What problem do retirement accounts mainly solve?
question_text.kk: What problem do retirement accounts mainly solve?

answer_text.en: Moving part of current income into years when work income may be lower or absent
answer_text.ru: Moving part of current income into years when work income may be lower or absent
answer_text.kk: Moving part of current income into years when work income may be lower or absent

answer_text.en: Making short-term shopping easier
answer_text.ru: Making short-term shopping easier
answer_text.kk: Making short-term shopping easier

answer_text.en: Guaranteeing high investment returns
answer_text.ru: Guaranteeing high investment returns
answer_text.kk: Guaranteeing high investment returns

answer_text.en: Replacing the need for cash reserves
answer_text.ru: Replacing the need for cash reserves
answer_text.kk: Replacing the need for cash reserves

question_text.en: A tax-deferred account has a large balance. What should the owner remember?
question_text.ru: A tax-deferred account has a large balance. What should the owner remember?
question_text.kk: A tax-deferred account has a large balance. What should the owner remember?

answer_text.en: Future withdrawals may be taxable, so after-tax spendable value matters
answer_text.ru: Future withdrawals may be taxable, so after-tax spendable value matters
answer_text.kk: Future withdrawals may be taxable, so after-tax spendable value matters

answer_text.en: Deferred means tax never exists
answer_text.ru: Deferred means tax never exists
answer_text.kk: Deferred means tax never exists

answer_text.en: The full balance is always tax-free cash
answer_text.ru: The full balance is always tax-free cash
answer_text.kk: The full balance is always tax-free cash

answer_text.en: Tax-deferred accounts cannot compound
answer_text.ru: Tax-deferred accounts cannot compound
answer_text.kk: Tax-deferred accounts cannot compound

question_text.en: What makes tax-free growth valuable over long horizons?
question_text.ru: What makes tax-free growth valuable over long horizons?
question_text.kk: What makes tax-free growth valuable over long horizons?

answer_text.en: Investment gains can become large, and qualified tax-free treatment may protect those gains
answer_text.ru: Investment gains can become large, and qualified tax-free treatment may protect those gains
answer_text.kk: Investment gains can become large, and qualified tax-free treatment may protect those gains

answer_text.en: Tax-free accounts remove all market losses
answer_text.ru: Tax-free accounts remove all market losses
answer_text.kk: Tax-free accounts remove all market losses

answer_text.en: After-tax contributions are always larger than pre-tax contributions
answer_text.ru: After-tax contributions are always larger than pre-tax contributions
answer_text.kk: After-tax contributions are always larger than pre-tax contributions

answer_text.en: Rules never apply to tax-free accounts
answer_text.ru: Rules never apply to tax-free accounts
answer_text.kk: Rules never apply to tax-free accounts

question_text.en: Why is employer matching often a high-priority contribution target?
question_text.ru: Why is employer matching often a high-priority contribution target?
question_text.kk: Why is employer matching often a high-priority contribution target?

answer_text.en: It can add employer money to the account before investment returns begin
answer_text.ru: It can add employer money to the account before investment returns begin
answer_text.kk: It can add employer money to the account before investment returns begin

answer_text.en: It guarantees the account cannot fall
answer_text.ru: It guarantees the account cannot fall
answer_text.kk: It guarantees the account cannot fall

answer_text.en: It removes vesting rules
answer_text.ru: It removes vesting rules
answer_text.kk: It removes vesting rules

answer_text.en: It means the employee should never save more personally
answer_text.ru: It means the employee should never save more personally
answer_text.kk: It means the employee should never save more personally

question_text.en: In Kazakhstan, how should mandatory pension contributions be viewed in a personal retirement plan?
question_text.ru: In Kazakhstan, how should mandatory pension contributions be viewed in a personal retirement plan?
question_text.kk: In Kazakhstan, how should mandatory pension contributions be viewed in a personal retirement plan?

answer_text.en: As an important baseline that may need voluntary and flexible layers depending on goals
answer_text.ru: As an important baseline that may need voluntary and flexible layers depending on goals
answer_text.kk: As an important baseline that may need voluntary and flexible layers depending on goals

answer_text.en: As proof that no personal planning is needed
answer_text.ru: As proof that no personal planning is needed
answer_text.kk: As proof that no personal planning is needed

answer_text.en: As daily spending money
answer_text.ru: As daily spending money
answer_text.kk: As daily spending money

answer_text.en: As a guarantee that inflation cannot affect retirement income
answer_text.ru: As a guarantee that inflation cannot affect retirement income
answer_text.kk: As a guarantee that inflation cannot affect retirement income
